title: Siemens India Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Siemens India Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India Global Group in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
